sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after MOUSE on target
b = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
a = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Check if anything changed besides timer
changed = False
for n in a['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ['N', 'W']:
        for m in b['nodes']:
            if m['color'] == n['color'] and m['hash'] == n['hash']:
                break
        else:
            print(f"New object: {n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Try MOUSE on gray ground
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 60, 'col': 32}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
